seoTitle: Gundiah vs Gungaloon — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Gundiah and Gungaloon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gundiah and Gungaloon.
heading: Gundiah vs Gungaloon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gundiah, Queensland and Gungaloon, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gundiah has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Gungaloon (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gundiah or Gungaloon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gundiah has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Gungaloon scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gundiah scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Gungaloon scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gundiah or Gungaloon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gundiah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
